# Copilot Instructions for Profitlord

## Project Overview

Profitlord is an automated profit-tracking and business-intelligence platform consisting of:

- **Static site** (GitHub Pages) generated into `docs/` by `deploy-seo.js`
- **Backend API** (`server/`) ‚Äî Node 20, no external framework, deployed on Render
- **Worker** (`worker/`) ‚Äî Cloudflare Worker (Wrangler), with a D1 SQLite schema
- **Souls registry** (`docs/agents.json`) ‚Äî AI agents (souls) with roles and capabilities
- **Live state** (`docs/state.json`) ‚Äî updated by `scripts/update-state.js` on every CI run
- **Command queue** (`docs/queue.jsonl`) ‚Äî consumed by `scripts/consume-queue.js`
- **Ledger** (`docs/ledger.jsonl`) ‚Äî append-only event log

## Repository Conventions

### General
- Use **Node 20** for all server and script code
- Use `'use strict';` at the top of every `.js` file
- No build step for server or scripts ‚Äî plain CommonJS (`require`/`module.exports`)
- Do not add external npm dependencies unless absolutely necessary; prefer Node built-ins (`http`, `https`, `crypto`, `fs`)

### File layout
- All generated static pages live in `docs/`; never edit them manually ‚Äî they are regenerated by `deploy-seo.js`
- `docs/state.json` is machine-written; edit `docs/agents.json` to change souls data
- `docs/agents.json` is the single source of truth for the souls registry
- Scripts in `scripts/` are run by CI in this order: `update-state.js` ‚Üí `consume-queue.js` ‚Üí `validate.js`

### State schema (`docs/state.json`)
- `health`: integer 0‚Äì100
- `current_task`: string
- `updated_at`: ISO 8601 timestamp
- `souls`: object keyed by `agent.name`, each entry mirrors the shape from `docs/agents.json`

### Backend (`server/index.js`)
- Pure Node `http.createServer` ‚Äî no Express/Fastify
- All CORS responses must include `Access-Control-Allow-Origin: https://uncommonpope-png.github.io`
- Required env vars: `GH_TOKEN`, `GH_OWNER`, `GH_REPO`, `GH_CLIENT_ID`, `GH_CLIENT_SECRET`, `REDIS_URL`
- Session tokens are stored in Redis; the Redis client is initialized lazily

### Worker (`worker/`)
- Cloudflare Workers runtime (Wrangler)
- Schema defined in `worker/schema.sql`; seed data in `worker/seed.sql`
- Worker source lives under `worker/src/`

### CI / GitHub Actions (`.github/workflows/nreal-build.yml`)
- Runs on push to `main`, manual dispatch, and daily at 03:00 UTC
- Env vars set in the workflow: `SITE_URL`, `OUTPUT_DIR=docs`, `SITE_NAME`, `SITE_DESCRIPTION`
- The bot commits generated `docs/` changes with message `nreal: regenerate docs [skip ci]`
- Do not add steps that require secrets not already listed in the workflow

### Enqueuing commands
- Use `node scripts/enqueue-command.js <TYPE> [json-payload]` ‚Äî never edit `docs/queue.jsonl` directly
- Valid command types include `BUILD:book`, `SCAN`, `PING`, `DELEGATE:<SoulName>`

### Security
- Never commit secrets, tokens, or API keys
- The `GH_TOKEN` variable is only read at runtime from the environment
- CORS is locked to `https://uncommonpope-png.github.io`

## Key URLs

| Resource | URL |
|----------|-----|
| GitHub Pages site | `https://uncommonpope-png.github.io/Profitlord/` |
| nreal console | `https://uncommonpope-png.github.io/Profitlord/nreal.html` |
| Dashboard | `https://uncommonpope-png.github.io/Profitlord/dashboard.html` |
| Live state | `https://uncommonpope-png.github.io/Profitlord/state.json` |
| Ledger | `https://uncommonpope-png.github.io/Profitlord/ledger.jsonl` |
